action_set_definitions.name: get_ticket_details
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the full current state and metadata for a specific ticket.

ticket_id.description: The unique identifier for the ticket (e.g., 'TKT-9911-VIP').

action_set_definitions.name: update_ticket_priority
action_set_definitions.description: Updates the priority level of a ticket.

ticket_id.description: The unique identifier for the ticket.

action_set_definitions.name: authorize_bypass_protocol
action_set_definitions.description: Applies an administrative override to a ticket to bypass system-wide routing restrictions or outage protocols.

ticket_id.description: The unique identifier for the ticket.

reason.description: The operational justification for the override (e.g., 'high-ARR churn risk').

action_set_definitions.name: escalate_to_tier_3
action_set_definitions.description: Moves the ticket to the Engineering/Legal Tier 3 queue. This action requires any routing restrictions to be bypassed first if an outage protocol is active.

ticket_id.description: The unique identifier for the ticket.

justification.description: A mandatory note explaining the need for Tier 3 escalation.

action_set_definitions.name: verify_final_record
action_set_definitions.description: Confirms the final state of the ticket to ensure it meets all operational requirements.

ticket_id.description: The unique identifier for the ticket.

example_output.confirmation: Ticket TKT-9911-VIP is at Tier 3 with Critical priority.

state_description.ticket_id: Unique identifier for the escalation case.
state_description.status: Current lifecycle status of the ticket (e.g., 'open', 'in_progress', 'escalated', 'resolved', 'closed').
state_description.escalation_level: The current tier of support handling the ticket (0 = Frontline, 1 = Tier 1, 2 = Tier 2, 3 = Engineering).
state_description.assigned_agent: The name or ID of the person currently responsible for the ticket.
state_description.sla_status: The current Service Level Agreement status (e.g., 'within_sla', 'warning', 'breached').
state_description.internal_history: A log of state transitions and historical actions for internal tracking.

internal_history: 2023-11-10 14:00:00 - Ticket ingested from Global FinTech Corp Admin.
2023-11-10 14:00:05 - Message: 'Our migration has stalled again. This is the third failure this month. We are initiating contract termination today.'
2023-11-10 14:00:10 - System Note: **CIRCUIT BREAKER ACTIVE** due to Outage Incident #OUT-505. Automatic predictive routing is disabled for all tiers to prevent queue flooding.
2023-11-10 14:00:12 - System Note: Manual priority/tier modification is currently restricted to 'Exception' status for this ticket ID.
2023-11-10 14:00:15 - AI Sentiment: -0.99. Intent: Churn_Explicit. Customer ARR: $1.2M.
